title: What Is an AI Chief Business Officer (CBO)?
excerpt: Your business needs consistent content, social media, and lead generation — but executing all three while running the company is nearly impossible. An AI CBO closes that gap.

title: How AgentGrow Works: From Sign-Up to Your First Published Post
excerpt: Getting a dedicated AI agent working on your business takes less than 24 hours. Here is the complete walkthrough from choosing a plan to reading your first activity report.

title: How to Review and Approve Your Agent's Content
excerpt: Your AI CBO creates content based on your business profile. Before anything goes live, it appears in your dashboard for review. Here is how the approval workflow operates.

title: AI CBO vs. Hiring a Marketing Team: The Real Numbers
excerpt: Building a content and marketing operation in-house takes time and money. Here is how the cost, speed, and output of an AI CBO compare to a traditional marketing hire.

title: How to Get Your Facebook & Instagram Credentials for AgentGrow
excerpt: Step-by-step guide to getting your Facebook Page ID, Page Access Token, and Instagram Account ID so your AI agent can post on your behalf.

title: How to Set Up Blog Publisher (GitHub Pages) for AgentGrow
excerpt: Step-by-step guide to creating a GitHub repository and Personal Access Token so your AI agent can publish blog posts to your website via GitHub Pages.

title: How to Set Up SEO Analyst (Google Search Console) for AgentGrow
excerpt: Step-by-step guide to creating a Google Cloud service account and granting Search Console access so your AI agent can monitor your SEO performance.
